TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Ed_Beach, title = Ed_Beach, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ed_Beach} }

S.FORM: Ed Beach nalecuhan i American, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput. Ed Beach i 1950 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 5 ku uwac atu silsil 59, namapili' tu nu Minneapolis Lakers putiput. 1 bulad 25 demiad, 1993 a mihca, Ed Beach, miunduay. (mapatay i 1996 a mihca)
S.PHON: …ôd b…ôa ¶ƒß nar~…æ…ô ¶uƒßan i am…ôri ¶an, nanu sjubaj kanas-mar~…æi miunduaj nu amir~…æika nba nisakaput. …ôd b…ôa ¶ƒß i **** a miƒß ¶an nba sapapir~…æi î~ ° mimar~…æiaj a kawaw, saka * ku uwa ¶ atu sir~…æsir~…æ **, namapir~…æi î~ ° tu nu minn…ôapor~…æis r~…æak…ôrs putiput. * bur~…æad ** d…ômiad, **** a miƒß ¶a, …ôd b…ôa ¶ƒß, miunduaj. (mapataj i **** a miƒß ¶a)
S.FORM: Ed Beach nalecuhan i American, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput. Ed Beach i 1950 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 5 ku uwac atu silsil 59, namapili' tu nu Minneapolis Lakers putiput. 1 bulad 25 demiad, 1993 a mihca, Ed Beach, miunduay. (mapatay i 1996 a mihca)
